name: UniMed+ solfeggio with VR
short_description: Solfeggio frequency meditation to improve concentration and memory. Aim for a high score with brain training. You can also use VR devices to immerse yourself in a fantasy world and meditate.
detailed_description:
Unlock Your Inner Peace with UniMed+.

Dive into a transformative journey with our meditation app that harnesses the power of Solfeggio frequencies. Designed for both beginners and seasoned meditators, our app offers a unique experience to elevate your mindfulness practice.

Features:

Solfeggio Mixer.

BGM Mixer.

Meditation timer.

Breath control training.

BGM uses spatial audio (3D sound) technology.

Spatial audio creates an immersive experience by simulating sounds from all directions: above, below, around, behind you.

Why Solfeggio Frequencies?

These ancient sound frequencies are believed to promote healing, balance, and spiritual growth. Each tone resonates with different aspects of your well-being, helping you achieve deeper relaxation and focus.

supported_languages: English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
